modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Missing toolbar options in Xtender when using Chrome.

full_description_text: User signed into Xtender and found essential toolbar options absent. The toolbar features, such as Text Box and highlighting, are not visible. This issue specifically occurs when accessing Xtender through the Chrome browser. The user requires these functionalities for their tasks.
short_description: Missing toolbar options in Xtender when using Chrome.
description: User signed into Xtender and found essential toolbar options absent. The toolbar features, such as Text Box and highlighting, are not visible. This issue specifically occurs when accessing Xtender through the Chrome browser. The user requires these functionalities for their tasks.
